name: controle-operacoes-tests
description: Suite de testes - Controle de Operacoes

scripts.test:usuario:headed: set PW_HEADED=1 && set PW_SLOW_MO=700 && npx playwright test --config=playwright.usuario.config.js --headed
scripts.test:usuario:watch: set PW_HEADED=1 && set PW_SLOW_MO=1200 && npx playwright test --config=playwright.usuario.config.js --headed --reporter=line
